---
title: "report"
output: pdf_document
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

-dataset documentation: <https://baseballsavant.mlb.com/csv-docs>
-mlb_swings_2026_reduced contains the first 30,000 complete swing observations of the 2026 MLB season. 

```{r, child = "tree-methods-timothy-WIP.Rmd"}
```
